title: hapalorchis bicornis
intro: Hapalorchis bicornis, also known as the two-horned orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hapalorchis bicornis include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a wound healer. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
